## build target contains a misspelled package (MaxWidth: 80)

Error: Failed to configure build target //server:server (BUILD001)
│
│  In server/BUILD.bazel:6:17
│
│  6 |         "//libs:payemnts",
│    :                 ^^^^^^^^ this target is not defined in //libs
│
│ hint: Did you mean '//libs:payments'?
│
│ For more details, see https://docs.example.test/errors/BUILD001

## server startup error (MaxWidth: 80)

Error: Server failed to start (SRV002)
│
│ context: The address 127.0.0.1:8080 is already in use by api-dev-server (pid:
│   41812)
│ hint: Set API_SERVER_PORT or pass --port to choose a different port

## custom see-also prefix

Error: Configuration file is invalid (CFG123)
│
│ Explain with: https://docs.example.test/errors/CFG123

## command-line argument error

Error: Invalid value for --jobs
│
│  In command line
│
│  --jobs=0
│         ^ must be at least 1
│
│ hint: If you want maximum parallelism, use --jobs=:ncpu

## environment warning

Warning: Remote cache is disabled because the auth token is missing
│
│  In environment
│
│  BUILDKIT_REMOTE_CACHE=1
│  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ requires BUILDKIT_CACHE_TOKEN
│
│ hint: Set BUILDKIT_CACHE_TOKEN or unset BUILDKIT_REMOTE_CACHE

## source line with tabs

Error: Tab-aligned source
│
│  In tabs.txt
│
│  x value = 1
│    ^^^^^ aligned after tab

## wrapping overflows unbreakable words (MaxWidth: 24)

Error: supercalifragilisticexpialidocious

## wrapping preserves internal whitespace (MaxWidth: 24)

Error: alpha  beta gamma

## wrapping trims leading whitespace after split (MaxWidth: 24)

Error: alpha      beta
│      gamma

## two annotations on same line (MaxWidth: 80)

Error: Cannot use untyped string constant as int value (TYP041)
│
│  In config/limits.go
│
│  3 | var MaxAttempts int = "five"
│    :                 ^^^   ^^^^^^
│    :                 |     └── untyped string constant
│    :                 └── declared type
│
│ For more details, see https://docs.example.test/errors/TYP041

## annotations on different lines (MaxWidth: 80)

Error: Return value has wrong type (TYP073)
│
│  In timeout/parse.go
│
│  3 | func Parse(s string) time.Duration {
│    :                      ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ declared as time.Duration
│  4 |     return s
│    :            ^ but a string value is returned
│
│ For more details, see https://docs.example.test/errors/TYP073

## two annotations on single-line source

Error: The --input and --output flags must refer to different paths
│
│  In command line
│
│  myapp --input=build.log --output=build.log
│                ^^^^^^^^^          ^^^^^^^^^
│                |                  └── would be overwritten
│                └── read from here

## multiline source without annotations

Error: Multiline source is attached without a span
│
│  In input.txt
│
│  41 | line one
│  42 | line two

## multi-line span renders as a separate block

Error: Multiline span has surrounding single-line labels
│
│  In blocks.txt
│
│  50 | single := "before"
│     :           ^^^^^^^^ single-line label before
│
│  51 | first line
│     : ^^^^^^^^^^
│  52 | second line
│     : ^^^^^^ multi-line label
│
│  53 | single := "after"
│     :           ^^^^^^^ single-line label after

## single-line label before multi-line span on same line

Error: Single-line label starts before a multiline span on the same line
│
│  In same-line-before.txt
│
│  60 | before middle
│     : ^^^^^^ before the multiline span
│
│  60 | before middle
│     :        ^^^^^^
│  61 | finish
│     : ^^^^^^ multi-line label

## single-line label after multi-line span on same line

Error: Single-line label starts after a multiline span on the same line
│
│  In same-line-after.txt
│
│  70 | begin
│     : ^^^^^
│  71 | middle after
│     : ^^^^^^ multi-line label
│
│  71 | middle after
│     :        ^^^^^ after the multiline span

## single-line label inside multi-line span renders as a separate block

Error: Single-line label is contained in a multiline span
│
│  In inside-multiline.txt
│
│  80 | begin and inside
│     : ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
│  81 | finish
│     : ^^^^^^ multi-line label
│
│  80 | begin and inside
│     :           ^^^^^^ inside the multiline span

## mixed labeled and unlabeled annotations

Error: Mismatched delimiters
│
│  In query.txt
│
│  filter(items[ where x > 0)
│              ^            ^
│              |            └── expected ']' to close the bracket above
│              └── opening bracket

## annotations around emoji grapheme clusters

Error: Status text uses unsupported glyphs
│
│  In status.txt
│
│  status: "👩‍💻 ready"
│           ^^ ^^^^^
│           |  └── text after emoji stays aligned
│           └── emoji is one grapheme cluster

## annotations across multiple snippets

Error: Configuration value changed type
│
│  In config.old
│
│  timeout_ms = 1000
│               ^^^^ previously an integer
│
│  In config.new
│
│  timeout_ms = "fast"
│               ^^^^^^ now a string

## overlapping annotations on same line

Error: Type errors in argument expression
│
│  In report.go
│
│  sum := total(items.length)
│         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ total expects []int, got int
│               ^^^^^^^^^^^^ slices have no .length field; use len(items)

## point annotation at end of source

Error: Missing semicolon
│
│  In expr.go
│
│  x := foo()
│            ^ insert ';' here

## point annotation on LF line break

Error: Missing semicolon before next statement
│
│  In lf.go
│
│  10 | alpha := 1
│     :           ^ insert ';' before newline
│  11 | beta := 2
│     : ^^^^ next statement starts here

## point annotation on CRLF line break

Error: Missing semicolon before next statement
│
│  In crlf.go
│
│  20 | alpha := 1
│     :           ^ insert ';' before CRLF
│  21 | beta := 2
│     : ^^^^ next statement starts here
